title: Requirement to provide service
doc_html:
§1604. Requirement to provide service

            No water cooperative shall arbitrarily deny a request for water service to a properly permitted residential or commercial structure that is located within the cooperative's service area. This Section does not prohibit a cooperative from discontinuing water service to a customer who fails to pay service charges or for other just cause. Notwithstanding R.S. 45:1603, this Section applies to all water cooperatives.

            Acts 2023, No. 360, §1.
doc_text:
§1604.  Requirement to provide service
No water cooperative shall arbitrarily deny a request for water service to a properly
permitted residential or commercial structure that is located within the cooperative's service
area.  This Section does not prohibit a cooperative from discontinuing water service to a
customer who fails to pay service charges or for other just cause.  Notwithstanding R.S.
45:1603, this Section applies to all water cooperatives.
Acts 2023, No. 360, §1.
